text:
This page lists the music associated with the Hunter × Hunter anime adaptations and other related media.

Openings

1999 Anime

 
Opening_1.png|Ohayou by Keno|link=Ohayou
Opening_2.png|Taiyou Wa Yoru Mo Kagayaku by Wino|link=Taiyou Wa Yoru Mo Kagayaku
 

OVA

 
Opening-ova_1.png|link=Pale Ale|Pale Ale by Kurosawa Kenichi
Opening-ova_2.png|link=Pray|Pray by Wish
Opening-ova_3.png|link=Believe In Tomorrow|Believe In Tomorrow by Sunflower's Garden
 

2011 Anime

 
Departure! Cover.png|Departure! by Ono Masatoshi|link=Departure!
HxH2011 OP2 IMG2.png|Departure! -second version- by Ono Masatoshi|link=Departure! -second version-
